description: baseline: naive single-threaded, Instant.parse, String.split, ArrayList percentiles
indexOf parsing, manual ISO timestamp, StringBuilder output, double[] sliding state
single sort for both p50/p99 percentiles
1MB reader buffer + sensor ID interning via HashMap
quickselect O(n) for percentiles instead of full sort O(n log n)
fast manual double parser (no improvement, within noise)
compact SensorWindow key (no type string), separate emitted sets, fast double parser
bounded scan with floor/ceiling in emitReadyWindows
emit only at end, no intermediate emissions
direct sensor index from digits, eliminates HashMap lookup
memory-mapped I/O with byte-level parsing (no improvement vs BufferedReader)
multi-threaded parallel chunk processing with byte[] parsing
independent file handles per thread (no improvement)
pre-allocate sensor rows + hoist sRow (no improvement, memory waste)
fixed-offset parsing (JIT already optimizes comma scan)
smaller initial SlidingState array (more resizes, no gain)
